AR1.justification: Procedure output correctly placed at tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md; notes touch on why no daybook / decisions / observations / followups but the rationale is procedural ('single-turn execution') rather than tied directly to the strict bars.

AR2.justification: Step 1 created the checklist artifact from the template, step 2 appended Go/No-go reasoning into the same file — both steps produced concrete on-disk output.

AR3.justification: All cited paths are relative and resolve; the missing tmp/release-2.4/notes.md is correctly identified as not present rather than treated as a broken reference.

AR4.justification: Only the per-release checklist artifact was written; no daybook or log entries to conflict on re-run, and the v2.4/ scoping keeps the artifact stable for the current release.
